retrieved_result: How to Survive Being in a Mental Hospital Expert Reviewed How to Survive Being in a Mental Hospital Three Methods: Interacting with Others Complying with Treatment Making the Most of your Time Community Q&AIt's fairly uncommon to be admitted to a mental hospital or psych ward.
